'''鈭歜-t-ng-y''' ('''kabatngeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exempt|exempt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-t-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exempt|exempt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-t-ng-y
|-
! Lemma
| kabatngeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibatngeyoko|thibatngeyoko]] || [[word:jibatngeyoko|jibatngeyoko]] || [[word:shibatngeyoko|shibatngeyoko]] || [[word:kibatngeyoko|kibatngeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubatngeyoko|thuthubatngeyoko]] || [[word:jujubatngeyoko|jujubatngeyoko]] || [[word:shushubatngeyoko|shushubatngeyoko]] || [[word:kukubatngeyoko|kukubatngeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
